_comment: All weights within a group must sum to 1.0. Change numbers here to adjust scoring. Do not touch scoring.js unless adding new data sources.

crowd_score._comment: What feeds the Crowd Score. Currently all stubbed — see /api folder for future live connections.

streaming_data._comment: Spotify streams normalized for time and catalog size. See /api/spotify.js

sales_chart_performance._comment: Billboard chart weeks and peak position. See /api/billboard.js

onsite_vibe_tap._comment: Anonymous cookie-based on-site rating. Stored in browser localStorage.

normalization._comment_time_decay: Prevents older albums from dominating purely due to accumulated streams. Albums are compared within a rolling window.
normalization._comment_catalog: Adjusts for artists with large back catalogs pulling streams from this album.

critic_score._comment: Outlet weights reflect reach, credibility, and music-specific focus. Must sum to 1.0.

normalization._comment: All outlet scores converted to 0-100 before weighting.
normalization._comment_baseline: Accounts for outlets that systematically score higher or lower than average.
normalization._comment_minimum: Albums with fewer than 3 outlet scores receive a low_confidence flag.
normalization._comment_missing: If an outlet hasn't reviewed an album, redistribute its weight proportionally.

monthly_rankings._comment: Monthly favors crowd energy — what people are actually listening to right now.

alltime_rankings._comment: All-time favors critical consensus — longevity of critical opinion matters more historically.

tier_thresholds._comment: Combined score ranges that determine tier badges. Adjust these to recalibrate the distribution.

gap_badges._comment: Awarded when The Stage and The Crowd scores diverge significantly.

peoples_champion.label: People's Champion
peoples_champion._comment: Crowd loves it, critics are cold.

critics_darling.label: Critics' Darling
critics_darling._comment: Critics love it, crowd is lukewarm.

ondeck_states._comment: Albums in their 30-day evaluation window show these states instead of tier badges.
